# minio_iam_group (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a specific IAM group by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_iam_group" "admins" {
  name = "admins"
}

output "admin_members" {
  value = data.minio_iam_group.admins.members
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `members` (List of String)
- `policy` (String)
- `status` (String)
